message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Driver rotation: Lea out, Carson becomes Driver">
Task #2 has 9/9 consensus and CI green. Lea's driving phase is complete.

DRIVER ROTATION: Shutting down Lea and Carson. Carson will be respawned as Driver for Tasks #3-5 (HTMX focus mgmt, empty state, inline editing). Lea will be respawned as Reviewer. All other reviewers: stay active and maintain your context.

Please stand by.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Understood. Both my tasks are complete with 9/9 consensus. Ready for shutdown and respawn as Reviewer.

input.content: Acknowledged. Both tasks complete, happy to hand off the Driver role. Ready for shutdown whenever you send the request. I'll be back as Reviewer for Carson's driving phase.

content.text:
Ready for shutdown. Both assigned tasks delivered:

- **Task #2** (2b5789a): CSS gaps -- 7 items fixed, 9/9 consensus
